ProcessSection.title: The Rhythm of Creation
ProcessSection.description: A seamless orchestration of intuition and engineering.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We strip the noise away and find the real strategic core.

steps.title: Concept
steps.description: We turn direction into a visual and technical thesis.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: Design, motion and code move together instead of fighting each other.

steps.title: Refine
steps.description: We polish details until the work stops looking made and starts looking inevitable.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: The final output ships sharp, coherent and ready to perform.
